---
id: codespaces-service-session-complete-upload
title: "Complete upload"
description: "Finalizes a file upload, extracting the uploaded archive on the machine. Deprecated: use SessionCompleteFileUpload."
sidebar_label: "Complete upload"

hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Complete upload"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/workspaces/{workspaceId}/sessions/{sessionId}/complete-upload"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Finalizes a file upload, extracting the uploaded archive on the machine. Deprecated: use SessionCompleteFileUpload.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
